title: mikania glandulosissima
intro: Mikania glandulosissima, also known as the hairy mistflower, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Mikania glandulosissima include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
